items.text: Khalil delivered our MVP ahead of schedule with exceptional quality. His attention to detail and proactive communication made the entire process seamless.
items.name: Sarah Mitchell

items.text: Working with Khalil was a game-changer for our product. He transformed our rough ideas into a polished, scalable platform that our users love.
items.name: James Rodriguez

items.text: His full-stack expertise saved us months of development time. Khalil doesn't just write code — he thinks about the business impact of every decision.
items.name: Emily Chen

items.text: Outstanding UI/UX work combined with solid engineering. Khalil bridged the gap between our design team and backend developers flawlessly.
items.name: David Park
